_description: Generic bug-class checklist used by the QA agent on every project. Curated from common production failure modes — extend over time. The QA agent uses these as a framing prompt; concrete tests are still generated per-project.

categories.name: Missing / malformed input handling
probes: Endpoint called with empty body
Endpoint called with wrong Content-Type
Required field missing
Field is null instead of expected type
Field exceeds reasonable size (e.g. 10MB string)
Unicode / emoji in fields that look ASCII-only
Negative / zero / very large numeric values

categories.name: Authentication & authorization gaps
probes: Endpoint that should require auth accepts unauthenticated requests
User A can read/modify user B's resource by guessing the ID
Tokens not validated for expiry/signature
Role checks missing on admin-only paths

categories.name: Concurrency / race conditions
probes: Shared mutable state accessed without a lock
Two requests for the same resource succeed when only one should
Background thread modifies dict iterated by handler
TTL cleanup races with read

categories.name: Resource leaks & cleanup
probes: Files / sockets opened but not closed on error
Long-lived objects accumulate in a dict with no eviction
Subprocesses spawned without wait()
DB connections not returned to pool on exception

categories.name: Errors swallowed or leaked
probes: Bare `except:` that hides bugs
Server returns 500 with stacktrace instead of structured error
Frontend keeps spinning when backend fails
Partial failures leave inconsistent state

categories.name: Domain state-machine violations
probes: Action triggered in a phase that should disallow it
Same action triggered twice produces two effects
Game/workflow can be 'finished' but still accept inputs
Skipping a required step leaves a half-initialized object

categories.name: API contract drift
probes: Response missing documented field
Status code is 200 even on logical failure
JSON field types inconsistent across endpoints
Pagination cursor invalidated by concurrent writes

categories.name: Text / encoding / i18n
probes: UTF-8 round-trip breaks (mojibake)
Locale-specific number/date formatting hard-coded
RTL languages render mirrored
Length truncation cuts a multi-byte char in half

categories.name: Deployment / packaging readiness
probes: requirements.txt / package.json missing a dep that is imported
Hardcoded localhost URLs or 127.0.0.1
Secrets/keys committed to source
App fails on Python 3.9 / Node 16 / etc. minimum stated version

categories.name: Observability gaps
probes: No logging on critical failure paths
Logs leak PII or secrets
Metrics missing for slow operations
No request_id correlation across services
